intro.content:
Ok — let’s treat this as a potential vinyl cape Jawa, not confirmed yet.

Original vinyl cape Jawas are very valuable, so unfortunately there are many fakes and cut-down Ben Kenobi capes around.

This app is a useful starting point, but do not rely on it alone. For anything valuable, get confirmation from experienced collector groups as well.

show_reference.title: Jawa Vinyl Cape Authentication Reference
show_reference.caption: Compare cape shape, surface texture on both sides, colour compared with an original Ben cape, and signs of a cut-down cape.

comparison_check.content:
Check the following:

• Cape shape
• Surface texture on both sides
• Colour compared with a genuine Ben cape
• Signs of a cut-down cape

A cut-down Ben cape is usually noticeably darker and the shape will not match correctly.

For more detailed information and reference photos, please check:
https://www.variantvillain.com/accessory-guide/jawa-vinyl-cape/
